🔒 Locked

Enter the 4-digit PIN to continue

Enter your 4-digit PIN to continue

⚙ Settings

Apps Script URL

Paste the deployment URL from your Google Apps Script web app (Extensions → Apps Script → Deploy → Manage deployments). It looks like https://script.google.com/macros/s/…/exec. This is stored in this browser only.

Sheet Tab Names

Each module reads from one tab in the connected spreadsheet. Set the tab name for each module below. Leave a field blank to use its default. The tab must already exist (with column headers in row 1).

Loading available tabs...

Security

The PIN is stored in this browser only. Leave blank to keep the current PIN. If you forget it, clear your browser’s site data for this app to reset to the default.

Account Management

Usernames admin and user are built-in.
Extra accounts are stored in the USERS sheet tab and sync across all devices automatically.
Passwords must be at least 4 characters. Admin: full access. User: view & edit only.

Create Account

Module Availability

Disable specific modules for non-admin users. Disabled tabs show an Under Development message. Admins always have full access. Changes take effect immediately — no save needed.

About

PO WEBAPP V1.3
Backend: container-bound to the active spreadsheet.
Modules: purchased, incoming, samples, notes, invoice.
Settings & Design Mode adapted from JHONG Withdrawal System.
